notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Nico Hoerner steals (6) 3rd base. Alex Bregman steals (1) 2nd base. Throwing error by catcher J.T. Realmuto.

notableEvents.label: Ian Happ GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ian Happ grounds into a double play, third baseman Alec Bohm to second baseman Edmundo Sosa to first baseman Bryce Harper. Seiya Suzuki out at 2nd. Ian Happ out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Ian Happ hit by pitch. Seiya Suzuki to 2nd.
